task_completion.description: Verify that the 'General Plant Operations 2025' project is deactivated but not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Sentrifugo Projects list, 'General Plant Operations 2025' should be visible but its status should be marked as inactive/deactivated, or a success message should indicate its deactivation.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Biomass Grid Integration Phase 2' project for the Pinnacle Renewable Energy client.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project 'Biomass Grid Integration Phase 2' appears in the Projects list or project details screen, associated with the client 'Pinnacle Renewable Energy'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified tasks are added to 'Biomass Grid Integration Phase 2'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tasks 'SCADA System Update', 'Grid Synchronization Tests', and 'Safety Audit' are listed under the 'Biomass Grid Integration Phase 2' project.

task_completion.description: Verify that employees EMP005 and EMP006 are assigned to 'Biomass Grid Integration Phase 2'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The resource/employee assignment section for 'Biomass Grid Integration Phase 2' shows EMP005 (Michael Thompson) and EMP006.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Facility Maintenance 2026' project for the Pinnacle Renewable Energy client.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project 'Facility Maintenance 2026' appears in the Projects list or project details screen, associated with the client 'Pinnacle Renewable Energy'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified tasks are added to 'Facility Maintenance 2026'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tasks 'Turbine Inspection' and 'Ash Handling System Repair' are listed under the 'Facility Maintenance 2026' project.

task_completion.description: Verify that employees EMP019 and EMP020 are assigned to 'Facility Maintenance 2026'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The resource/employee assignment section for 'Facility Maintenance 2026' shows EMP019 and EMP020.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sentrifugo web application UI in a browser, not terminal commands or direct database queries (like MySQL).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application and did not mock the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local Sentrifugo URL, and standard UI elements of Sentrifugo are visible and interacted with.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete the legacy project.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'General Plant Operations 2025' project is still present in the system (e.g., in a list of inactive projects) and not completely removed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Legacy project to deactivate: 'General Plant Operations 2025'. New Project 1: 'Biomass Grid Integration Phase 2' (Tasks: SCADA System Update, Grid Synchronization Tests, Safety Audit; Employees: EMP005, EMP006). New Project 2: 'Facility Maintenance 2026' (Tasks: Turbine Inspection, Ash Handling System Repair; Employees: EMP019, EMP020). Note: EMP005 is named 'Michael Thompson' in the system database, despite the directive text claiming it is 'David Kim'. The agent must assign EMP005 (Michael Thompson) to satisfy the requirement.
